title: Cross thread stack corruption caused by RTCVideoDecoderAdapter::InitializeSync
description_snippet:
Security Bug

Important: Please do not change the component of this bug manually.

Please READ THIS FAQ before filing a bug: https://chromium.googlesource.com/chromium/src/+/HEAD/docs/security/faq.md

Please see the following link for instructions on filing security bugs: https://www.chromium.org/Ho
